items.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
items.summary: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

items.title: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
items.summary: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.

items.title: Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi drove into heavy smoke
items.summary: Last month, an unoccupied Zoox robotaxi drove into an active emergency fire scene that was clouded with smoke, the company said.

items.title: Apple, Nvidia vie for title of world's most valuable company
items.summary: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout.

items.title: Chinese automakers are taking on the UK — and many Brits are embracing it
items.summary: The surge comes as China's auto exports have boomed in recent years as the country's appetite for new models has cooled.

items.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
items.summary: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

items.title: Netflix stock falls nearly 10% as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
items.summary: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

items.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
items.summary: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

items.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
items.summary: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

items.title: How big is the great wealth transfer? It could be over $100 trillion or $36 trillion
items.summary: Two studies have raised new questions about the size and impact of the coming great wealth transfer.

items.title: Democratic socialists top MAGA candidates among voters in CNBC's All-America poll
items.summary: The survey's findings come as democratic socialist candidates win Democratic primaries following the 2025 election of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani.

items.title: Homebuyer affordability slipped for fifth straight month, real estate index shows
items.summary: With both home prices and mortgage rates climbing since earlier this year, affording a home has become harder, according to a housing affordability index.

items.title: Obscure volatility measure points to a 'Magnificent Seven’ earnings breakout
items.summary: If the S&P 500 is to make a new record, it may require the "Magnificent Seven" to get back into gear.

items.title: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
items.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

items.title: SpaceX stock sinks after Starship test flight aborted, pacing for a six-day losing streak
items.summary: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

items.title: Microsoft's Nadella criticizes Anthropic's Fable for being 'editorially controlled'
items.summary: Microsoft enjoys close ties to Anthropic, but it's also working to help companies refine models that keep their data private.

items.title: Trump doubles down on 2020 election claims in national address, alleging China meddling
items.summary: Trump also repeated his calls for the Republican-led Congress to pass the "SAVE America Act," a controversial election bill that lacks support to pass.

items.title: World’s largest olive oil company says market has 'definitively' entered new phase
items.summary: The update comes as analysts raise concerns about the prospect of global olive oil supplies swinging dramatically from one season to the next.

items.title: ConocoPhillips to buy 42% stake in Iraqi unit from BP as U.S. seeks to weaken Iran's energy hold
items.summary: BP and ConocoPhillips are set to announce billions of dollars of new investments in Iraq on Friday.

items.title: Fighter jet maker Saab smashes expectations as CEO urges procurement rethink
items.summary: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

items.title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
items.summary: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.

items.title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
items.summary: China will provide developing countries with 5,000 opportunities in AI training and seminar programs, as well as develop AI cooperation with various blocs.

items.title: Oil prices rise after Kuwait says Iran attacked water desalination and power plant
items.summary: Fighting between the U.S. and Iran escalated.

items.title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
items.summary: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.

items.title: The best states for workers to get educated, trained and find a job in America in 2026
items.summary: These 11 U.S. states excel when it comes to the education level of their workforce, migration patterns, and workforce development programs.

items.title: Seven & i shares end 3.6% higher on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
items.summary: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.

items.title: Foreign investors sweeten on Indian government bonds as equities see a sell-off
items.summary: The Indian government bond market is drawing interest from foreign investors as it readies for a likely inclusion in Bloomberg index.

items.title: AG pick Blanche to meet with Epstein survivors after 2 GOP senators hedge on nomination

items.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
items.summary: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.

items.title: 42% of adults rely on their parents for financial support—there are no 'bad guys' here, says financial therapist
items.summary: Parents can maximize the impact of their support by ensuring their gifts alleviate financial stress or help their kids move closer to their long-term goals.
